description: Extract the staggered EQ layout from EqSection.tsx into a synth-ui/ParametricEq component that accepts a variable number of bands. Each band: freq (knob or selector), gain (knob), optional Q (knob). Staggered layout with diagonal divider lines and band labels. Replace both EqSection (3-band mixer) and MFX Equalizer panel (4-band) with this component.
title: Generalize EqSection into a reusable ParametricEq component supporting 2-4 bands
